title: Sprint 17 — CEO Operating System
description: Control Center upgraded to CEO OS. Company overview page (Products/Growth/Architecture/Team/Timeline), Product Detail pages for every product, mobile experience overhaul, Product detail links across all panels.

title: Company + Product Detail routing
description: /company page with 5 sections (Products, Growth, Architecture, Team, Timeline). /product/[slug] dynamic route for every product with health, SEO, deploy history, and recommended actions.

title: DevOS is now a CEO Operating System
description: Control Center reframed from reporting dashboard to CEO Operating System. Sidebar grouped by function, bottom nav redesigned for native iPhone feel, health score prominent on mobile header.

title: Sprint 14 — AI CEO Assistant
description: AI briefing engine, Decision Center with AI recommendations, Agent Activity Feed, and Company Timeline. Control Center v3.

title: Sprint 13 — Control Center v2
description: Complete rebuild of Control Center as CEO operating dashboard. 10-panel layout, widget system, datasource layer, PWA support. 15/15 QA pass.

title: Datasource layer introduced
description: src/lib/datasources/ pattern established — each data source (GA4, Vercel, GitHub) isolated behind typed interface. Mock → real API swap requires zero UI changes.

title: Widget system built
description: Reusable widget library created: Widget (card wrapper), Metric, SeoScore, StatusPill. All dashboard panels share the same design language.

title: iPhone PWA enabled
description: DevOS Control Center installable as standalone iPhone app. manifest.json + apple-mobile-web-app meta tags. Zero native code required.

title: Sprint 12 — Growth Validation
description: QuickQR SEO improved 34→82. GA4 analytics code deployed to all 3 products. Product Hunt launch assets prepared for OGImageGen. Growth dashboard created.

title: QuickQR SEO: 34 → 82
description: robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JSON-LD schema, Open Graph, Twitter Card, H1 optimization, FAQ section, internal cross-links, canonical URL. Targeting 2.7M/mo keyword.

title: Sprint 11 — Agent SDK v1.0.0
description: BaseAgent class + 6 modules (Logger, EventBus, Config, Memory, Reporter, Timer). Deploy and QA agents upgraded to SDK v1.1.0. events.json auto-populated.

title: EventBus live — events.json auto-populated
description: All agent activity now persists to company/events.json via EventBus. Singleton bus shared across all agents. Non-blocking: failures never crash agents.

title: Sprint 10 — Architecture Foundation
description: company/*.json canonical data layer established. db.ts abstraction boundary created. Control Center deployed to Vercel. BACKEND_EVOLUTION_PLAN.md authored.

title: company/*.json canonical data layer
description: products.json, agents.json, events.json, decisions.json, finance.json are now the single source of truth for the entire company. db.ts is the only boundary that changes.

title: OGImageGen goes live
description: Third product launched: OGImageGen — Open Graph image generator for developers. High SEO score. Product Hunt assets prepared.

title: ImageCompress goes live
description: Second product launched: ImageCompress — browser-side image compression with no uploads. SEO score 92/100.

title: QuickQR goes live
description: First product launched: QuickQR — free QR code generator, no sign-up required. First live product of the DevOS portfolio.

title: DevOS company founded
description: Bootstrap agent created. First Next.js project generated from a single command. Autonomous software company architecture established.
